items.name_en: 550 New Jamie Mini Size Original Sheepskin Handbag! Soft Nappa leather handbag, featuring CARRE RIVE GAUCHE cross-stitching. Lightweight and compact, paired with an adjustable sliding shoulder strap for multiple wearing styles. The bag features a classic vintage distressed design, very stylish and versatile for commuting. Surprisingly lightweight with high practicality! Don't let the small size fool you, the capacity is definitely enough 👍 Can be carried by hand, worn over the shoulder, or crossbody! Definitely not a useless little bag 😎
items.name_cn:

🌈CALYPSO Small Sheepskin Crossbody/Clutch! Made from imported Italian sheepskin, the texture is soft and delicate, with a super silky feel! The classic Y-logo, chain, and buckle hardware are all made of gold matte hardware, perfectly interpreting elegance and ease.
Model: 801772

items.name_en: 🌈New Sade hobo is here! Black sheepskin material with a super soft texture 😎 Rhombus quilted sheepskin HOBO handbag LECASSANDRE. This fashionable and versatile handbag comes with a folding top handle and a detachable shoulder strap, offering multiple carrying ways. Equipped with a thin long chain. A small bag that fits a phone completely, can be carried by hand or crossbody, so exquisite!

items.name_en: Still minimalist new bucket bag, featuring imported sheepskin drawstring paired with a signature logo. Large capacity design, combining aesthetics and practicality, very roomy. The smooth and glossy sheepskin surface feels premium. Comes with a detachable pouch inside, adjustable shoulder strap, easily switching between a crossbody or shoulder bag! Satisfies various daily occasions. Full of three-dimensional feel, perfectly interpreting understated and minimalist~

items.name_cn:
2024 New LE 5A 7 HOBO
Y's 2024 Autumn New LE 5A 7 Handbag, continuing the classic hobo style, minimalist yet designed! The bag is made of black grained cowhide, with a slender leather strip running through the opening. The gold letter logo buckle becomes the focal point, paired with a black suede leather lining. The practical bucket shape adapts to both casual vacation and city scenes!
Model: 793088
Size: 26x31.5x15cm

items.name_cn:
💰
LE5 À 7 BABY Soft Grained Calfskin
The BABY version of the refined grained deer leather handbag. Features leather buckle closure. This bag has a soft structure, matching suede lining, and is lightweight and feminine. It includes an internal card holder and comes with an adjustable shoulder strap, suitable for both hand and shoulder carry~ The perfect choice for a light summer mini bag!
Size: 15×16x7CM
Model: 809461

items.name_cn:
💰
Y's 2024 Spring/Summer New Mini Tote
This mini tote is from the NEW SHAPE series! It uses new craftsmanship and smooth, soft calfskin. The leather is heat-pressed for a glossy, silky finish! The fan-shaped appearance and cut-out handle design make it stylish and exquisite! The bag features a versatile, avant-garde structure with two openings, allowing for both hand and crossbody/shoulder wear, perfectly adapting to any style you desire!
Model: 791069
Size: 29x19.5x10cm

items.name_cn:
💰
Monogram college
The classic messenger bag!!!
A messenger bag, as the name implies, is the bag carried by mail carriers when delivering newspapers and letters. Bags similar to those carried by mail carriers are collectively referred to as messenger bags. When mentioning messenger bags, this one from Y must be on the list!
Size: 24x17x6.5cm
Model: 392737
